title: Behold. . . The Resourcepackinator
description: Changes the name of some functional blocks such as Crafting, Smithing and Enchanting Table to Inators.
body:
This resourcepack changes the names of some functional blocks such as Crafting, Smithing and Enchanting Table to Inators.

Blocks changed:

Crafting Table->Craftinator 

Stonecutter->Stonecuttinator

Cartography Table->Cartographinator

Fletching Table->Fletchinator

Smithing Table->Smithinator

Grindstone->Grindinator

Loom->Loominator

Furnace->Furnace-inator

Blast Furnace->Blast Furnace-inator

Smoker->Smokeinator

Anvil->Anvilinator

Composter->Compostinator

Enchanting Table->Enchantinator

Brewing Stand->Brewinator

Beacon->Beaconinator
